intent_tree: {"开发一个音频文件处理程序": {"查找音频文件": {}, "验证音频文件是否可用": {}, "可选：将音频文件转换为统一格式": {}, "提取语音信息并转为文字": {"加载语音识别引擎": {}, "预处理音频文件": {}, "执行语音转文字任务": {"使用Google在线API进行语音识别": {}, "使用Whisper本地模型进行语音识别": {}}, "保存识别结果": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "配置目标目录和音频支持格式"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "扫描目标目录及其子目录，查找符合支持格式的音频文件"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "验证找到的音频文件是否可以被正确读取"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "记录有效音频文件及其时长"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "记录无效音频文件并输出错误信息"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "可选地将有效音频文件转换为指定格式"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "输出处理总结，包括有效、无效及已转换文件的数量"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "加载语音识别引擎（如Google API或Whisper模型）"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "预处理音频文件（标准化采样率、单声道、音量归一化）"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "选择语音识别模式（在线/离线）"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "通过Google Web Speech API执行语音识别"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "通过Whisper本地模型执行语音识别"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "保存识别后的文本内容到文件"}, {"id": "Node14", "description": "输出语音识别完成状态及统计信息"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "configure"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "validateFiles"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "validFile"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node5", "type": "invalidFile"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node6", "type": "convertOptional"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "summarize"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "summarize"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node8", "type": "prepareRecognition"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "preprocessAudio"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "selectMode"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "onlineRecognition"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node12", "type": "offlineRecognition"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node13", "type": "saveText"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "saveText"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node14", "type": "finalizeSummary"}]}
mapping: {"开发一个音频文件处理程序": {"nodes": ["Node1", "Node2", "Node3", "Node4", "Node5", "Node6", "Node7", "Node8", "Node9", "Node10", "Node11", "Node12", "Node13", "Node14"]}, "查找音频文件": {"nodes": ["Node1", "Node2"]}, "验证音频文件是否可用": {"nodes": ["Node3", "Node4", "Node5"]}, "可选：将音频文件转换为统一格式": {"nodes": ["Node6", "Node7"]}, "提取语音信息并转为文字": {"nodes": ["Node8", "Node9", "Node10", "Node11", "Node12", "Node13", "Node14"]}, "加载语音识别引擎": {"nodes": ["Node8"]}, "预处理音频文件": {"nodes": ["Node9"]}, "执行语音转文字任务": {"nodes": ["Node10", "Node11", "Node12"]}, "使用Google在线API进行语音识别": {"nodes": ["Node11"]}, "使用Whisper本地模型进行语音识别": {"nodes": ["Node12"]}, "保存识别结果": {"nodes": ["Node13", "Node14"]}}
